name: CopilotKit (AI Copilot for React Apps)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); CopilotKit Cloud is commercial; self-hostable

auth.notes: CopilotKit Cloud API key or self-hosted with own LLM keys

agent_readiness.notes: Add AI copilot to React apps. CopilotChat component for floating chat. useCopilotReadable() to expose app state to LLM. useCopilotAction() for LLM-invokable actions. CoAgents (LangGraph integration) for multi-step agentic workflows. CopilotTextarea for AI-enhanced inputs. Supports any LLM via LangChain backend. <CopilotKit publicApiKey=...> provider wraps app. Real-time state sync. Self-host via copilotkit/runtime Docker. TypeScript-native.

gotchas: Exposes app state to LLM — careful with sensitive data
Tight coupling to React component model
LangGraph dependency for CoAgents adds complexity
best_when: React apps adding AI assistant/copilot features quickly
SaaS products wanting embedded AI assistant without building from scratch
Teams using LangGraph wanting agent UI integration
Rapid prototyping of AI-enhanced user interfaces
avoid_when: Need full control over LLM interaction patterns
summary: CopilotKit adds AI copilot capabilities to React apps. useCopilotReadable() exposes app state to LLM, useCopilotAction() makes app functions callable by LLM. CopilotChat component, AI-enhanced textareas. LangGraph CoAgents for multi-step agentic workflows. Open source with cloud hosting option. Best for SaaS teams adding AI assistant UX to existing React apps without building LLM integration infrastructure from scratch.
